title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer; use Ollama models as drop-in LLMs for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); chat, multi-model, RAG, user management.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, pull, delete, and list models with fluent builder API.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma; ingest PDFs and query with local embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and model switching.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that routes GitHub Copilot calls to your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for Ollama: FastAPI services, Next.js chat, Discord bots, GPU tuning, etc.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All chat UI now supports Ollama backends; switch between local models in one click.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using your local Ollama models.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async HTTP, streaming chat, and model management.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama with GenServer behavior, streaming, and telemetry events.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger SDK module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM apps.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server that proxies channel messages to Ollama and streams responses back.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered AI commands: summarize, translate, rewrite, etc.
